title: Unearth
description: Lightweight Archaeology expansion mod adding more uses for pottery sherds through stamps and dyeable pots!
body:
# Unearth
Unearth is a mod that adds to the Trails and Tales archaeology update by adding more uses to pottery sherds through stamps and dyeable pot decals.

[![Made For Modfest 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23901711847e2f58e0bf750341d4d190e5f57d5a.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

## Stamps
Stamps can be placed using a Stamp Kit in your main hand and a dye in your offhand, first you need to equip a pottery sherd in the inventory of the stamp kit.

Stamps can be redyed by right-clicking them with a dye and can also be set to glow with a glow ink sac.

Additionally, stamps can be placed on decorated pots without a stamp kit by right-clicking them with dyes and glow ink sacs.

![Dyeable Stamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2db05eb798620aa4742520268368f7349b382cf3.png)
